channel.title: Package Handler on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Package Handler on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at FedEx as a Package Handler: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A detailed guide to working as a FedEx package handler, covering real pay, physical demands, benefits, and what actual employees report.

item.title: Working at UPS as a Package Handler: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about working as a UPS package handler, including pay, hours, benefits, and what real employees say about the job.
